Video.summary: Momentos apˇs o lanšamento, a equipe estß dividida tentando fugir da explosŃo iminente.
Video.title: O Tal do Murphy

Video.summary: The group encounters news crew zombies triggering haunting flashbacks from day one.
Video.title: Interrompemos Esta ProgramašŃo

Video.summary: Warren recovers from the drone crash; Doc and the others finally arrive in Newmerica.
Video.title: Bem-vindo ao Novapocalipse

Video.summary: Warren must leave her new life behind and find her way to Newmerica.
Video.title: Uma Nova Vida

Video.summary: Warren and the others are reunited with Addy in Limbo, an underground casino.
Video.title: Limbo

Video.summary: Sketchy and Skeezy reenact Doc's stories about the Founding Fathers.
Video.title: Histˇria Doida do Doc

Video.summary: Estes aprisiona os falantes e blends cativos, enquanto Warren e George planejam seu ataque a Altura.
Video.title: A Todo Custo

Video.summary: Soldier zombies in Washington, D.C.; Ten Thousand's mysterious past is revealed.
Video.title: Zumbi de Ašo Completo

Video.summary: When Mack tries to have a real date with Addy, he finds himself in a nightmare.
Video.title: Morra, Zumbi, Morra... Novamente

Video.summary: Heroes battle zombies and overeager bounty hunters; Murphy manages to escape.
Video.title: Luzes Brancas

Video.summary: In Upstate New York, a zombie baby proves to be an obstacle for a diverse group of survivors.
Video.title: Filhotes

Video.summary: A equipe luta pela sobrevivŕncia contra um culto de adoradores de zumbis.
Video.title: RessurreišŃo Z

Video.summary: Doc must spirit walk again to help save the Chief of the Water Keepers.
Video.title: Os Guardi§es de ┴gua

Video.summary: Em Chicago, Doc e Murphy encontram um grupo misterioso (e assassino), incluindo Sketchy e Skeezy.
Video.title: Amigos-Inimigos

Video.summary: A equipe tenta desesperadamente impedir uma fusŃo nuclear em uma usina cheia de zumbis irradiados.
Video.title: Ficando Radioativo

Video.summary: The heroes arrive in the farming outpost and find it overrun by zombies.
Video.title: Terra do CorašŃo

Video.summary: Warren trabalha com humanos, falantes e blends para ajudar George a derrotar Estes e Pandora.
Video.title: O Fim de Tudo

Video.summary: The survivors search for Warren's missing husband in Central Illinois; a zombie tornado.
Video.title: Lar Doce Lar Zumbi

Video.summary: Warren's dream leads the group back to Mercy Labs where she must perform a dangerous task.
Video.title: De Volta ao Laboratˇrio Mercy

Video.summary: An all-female commune in Utah is where the two groups of survivors reunite.
Video.title: IrmŃs da Misericˇrdia

Video.summary: Murphy learns more about his abilities when he is kidnapped by a group of outlaws; zombies attack.
Video.title: A Lei de Murphy

Video.summary: Warren and George search for Lt. Dante, who may be part of an underground network helping Talkers.
Video.title: Pacifica

Video.summary: Warren and the group must stop Zona from launching operation Black Rainbow.
Video.title: Monte Weather

Video.summary: 10K nearly loses everything as Panic and anti-Talker sentiments flare.
Video.title: Fuga de Altura

Video.summary: Talkers are forced to mine a hazardous waste landfill for the secret ingredient to bizkits.
Video.title: Estado Mineral

Video.summary: A equipe luta para abastecer em uma perigosa refinaria de petrˇleo repleta de zumbis.
Video.title: Ensinando Zumbis

Video.summary: Em um bar no estilo do Velho Oeste, a equipe participa de um concurso de tiro aos zumbis.
Video.title: Bem-Vindos ao Fu-Bar
